title: DM3
description: Structural diagnostic on a closed Android aarch64 Rust binary and a fixed 380-vertex C3-symmetric graph (P_95 □ K_4). Characterises the binary's geometric behaviour under twelve callable task modes. Confirmed claims: ARM64 cross-platform determinism (claim τ), trimodal sawtooth shape portability across Phase G G.2 cross-controls (claim σ″), same-config path-independence (claim χ). R8 live runtime trace remains open (OPEN_TIER3_BLOCKED). License: Zer0pa Genesis-DM3 Research and Receipt License v1.0 (SPDX: LicenseRef-Zer0pa-GDM3-RRL-1.0).
notes: License is Zer0pa Genesis-DM3 Research and Receipt License v1.0 (LicenseRef-Zer0pa-GDM3-RRL-1.0); master resolver at https://github.com/Zer0pa/ZPE-License-Commercial. This is a research artifact surface — see CLAIMS.md and CHARACTERIZATION_REPORT.md for the proof surface.
